completed_tasks.name: C2 deep inventory (Internal Modules — session-tracker, lifecycle, contracts)
C3 deep inventory (Delegation + Coordination — coordination, tmux, pressure)

remaining_tasks.name: C4 deep inventory (Hooks — observers, transforms, CQRS)
C5 deep inventory (Tool Surfaces — independent tools, doc intelligence)
C6 deep inventory (Assets — shipped primitives, agents, skills, commands)
C7 deep inventory (Sidecar — src/sidecar + root Next.js app)
C8 deep inventory (Foundation — src/shared, plugin.ts, index.ts)
Cross-cutting dependency graph (aggregate all cluster deps)

decisions.decision: 8 clusters defined (C1-C8) based on code surface analysis
decisions.rationale: Governance, Internal Modules, Delegation, Hooks, Tools, Assets, Sidecar, Foundation

decisions.decision: Coordination tools mapped to C3, not C5
decisions.rationale: Purpose > Mechanism: execute-slash-command, delegate-task are coordination, not tool surfaces

decisions.decision: Governance guards mapped to C1, not C4
decisions.rationale: Guards enforce governance; hook mechanism is implementation detail

decisions.decision: Session-tracker internals (hooks/, capture/) stay in C2
decisions.rationale: Module cohesion: internal implementation of session-tracker, not reusable outside

decisions.decision: Tests belong to their respective cluster
decisions.rationale: tests/features/ → C2, tests/tools/ → C3/C5, tests/hooks/ → C4, etc.

next_action: Continue AUDIT-03: dispatch C4 deep inventory specialist agent
context_notes: C1-C3 inventories complete. Key findings: 12 gaps in C1 (governance/config), 11 gaps in C2 (session-tracker defects, TODO-2 markers, dual-write), 11 gaps in C3 (dual detectors, coordinator bloat, no unified barrel). AUDIT-01 (codebase mapping) and AUDIT-02 (cluster inventory) complete. Phase directories created under .planning/phases/AUDIT-0{1-4}-*/. Stale folders authorized (A-E) but not yet executed.
